description: Golden fixture for Excel agent acceptance tests

rows.question: The solution must provide REST API endpoints for data exchange.
The solution must support SSO via SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect.

rows.existing_answer: Blue Yonder supports cloud-native SaaS deployment on Microsoft Azure.

rows.question: The solution must support data encryption at rest and in transit.

rows.existing_answer: Yes, the platform is fully GDPR compliant with data residency options.

rows.question: The system must handle 10,000 concurrent users with sub-second response times.
Does the system support "quotes" & unicode: łóść?
